brief_text:
**SECURITY BRIEF — Week of Feb 18–Feb 24**
*(Data updated Mar 15 — typical 14-day reporting delay)*

**Status:** NORMAL — Activity 17% below average
52 property incidents mapped across Hollywood Hills neighborhoods.

**Incident Breakdown:**
• Vehicle Security: 22 incidents (42%)
• Residential Security: 14 incidents (26%)
• Other Property: 16 incidents (30%)

Tracking 13% below same week last year (52 vs 60).
**Area of Note:** Nichols Canyon (25 incidents).
Patterns detected: other property activity in Nichols Canyon; vehicle security activity in Beachwood Canyon; residential security activity in Beachwood Canyon; vehicle security activity in Nichols Canyon; residential security activity in Nichols Canyon.
